title: clicktui configuration
description: Configuration file for clicktui, a terminal UI for ClickUp.

active_profile.description: Name of the currently active profile.

profiles.description: Map of profile names to profile configurations.

ui_state.description: Persisted UI preferences for a profile.

sort_field.description: Task list column to sort by.

sort_ascending.description: Sort direction: true for ascending, false for descending.

profile.description: A named profile containing authentication and workspace settings.

name.description: Profile identifier, must match the map key.

auth_method.description: Authentication mechanism: 'personal_token' for API token, 'oauth' for OAuth 2.0.

workspace_id.description: ClickUp workspace (team) ID to use by default.

space_id.description: ClickUp space ID to navigate to on launch.

list_id.description: ClickUp list ID for direct navigation. Requires workspace_id and space_id to also be set.

ui_state.description: Persisted UI preferences for this profile.
